source.description: Valmiki's Ramayana, the complete epic (all seven kandas), Ralph T. H. Griffith's English verse translation (1870-1874). Gutenberg boilerplate and the front-matter contents are stripped; the body is split on canto headings and packed into uniform ~chapter-sized segments.
source.ref: Project Gutenberg eBook #24869 — The Rámáyan of Válmíki, trans. R. T. H. Griffith (in books/, gitignored)
